flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Calvary University fell 34% between 2021 and 2024 (232 → 154).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Calvary University fell 33% between 2021 and 2024 (81.2% → 54.5%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Calvary University rose 22% between 2021 and 2024 ($11.6k → $14.1k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Calvary University rose 307% between 2021 and 2024 (11.1% → 45.2%).
